creator: bu7cher@yandex.ru
text:
As i see, your patch is obtained from NetBSD.
NetBSD have obtained this code from FreeBSD several years ago :-)
http://cvsweb.netbsd.org/bsdweb.cgi/src/sys/dev/usb/usb_subr.c.diff?r1=1.102&r2=1.103

This code was removed in rev. 1.63.
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/sys/dev/usb/usb_subr.c.diff?r1=1.62&r2=1.63
-- 
WBR, Andrey V. Elsukov
